description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build on Emscripten that runs on every push to main and on pull requests to main. Use a single ubuntu-latest job in a container with the mogemimi/gamedev-emscripten image, and run the workflow for both Debug and Release build configurations. Check out the repository with submodules and a fetch depth of 50, show the Emscripten compiler version, generate Ninja files with CMake, build the project, and run tests with Node.js.
